title: Action log query tool: list, detail, and context queries
purpose: Implement the action_log tool that gives the agent a queryable memory of its own actions. The tool supports three query modes: list (Level 1 summaries with filtering), detail (Level 2 for a specific call), and context (Level 3 for a specific call). The mutations and follow_ups query modes are added by NTA-003 and NTA-004 respectively. The tool output is compact by design — Level 1 list queries are cheap to call frequently.
task: Create crates/norn/src/tools/action_log.rs implementing the Tool trait. The tool accepts a query parameter (list, detail, context), an optional filter object, and an optional call_id. List queries return Level 1 compact summaries via ActionLog. Detail and context queries delegate to ActionLog::get_detail and get_context. The tool itself is logged at Level 1 only in the action log (no recursive noise). The tool is registered in the tool module.

requirements.title: ActionLogTool struct implementing Tool trait
requirements.spec: An ActionLogTool struct SHALL implement the Tool trait in crates/norn/src/tools/action_log.rs. The tool name SHALL be "action_log". The tool category SHALL be ToolCategory::Discovery. The input schema SHALL have: query (string enum: list, detail, context — required), filter (object with optional fields: tool, outcome, file, since, last — optional), and call_id (string — required for detail and context, ignored for list).
acceptance: crates/norn/src/tools/action_log.rs exists with ActionLogTool implementing Tool
Tool name is "action_log"
Tool category is Discovery
input_schema has query (required), filter (optional), call_id (optional)
query accepts exactly list, detail, context values

requirements.title: Filter object for query scoping
requirements.spec: The filter object SHALL support: tool (String — filter by tool name), outcome (String — "success", "error", or "blocked"), file (String — filter by affected file path, matched against summary_line), since (String — tool_call_id, return entries after this call), and last (u32 — return only the last N entries). All filter fields are optional. Multiple filters combine with AND logic. An empty or absent filter returns all entries.
acceptance: filter.tool filters to entries matching the tool name
filter.outcome filters to entries matching the outcome variant
filter.file filters to entries whose summary_line contains the file path
filter.since filters to entries recorded after the given tool_call_id
filter.last limits results to the most recent N entries
Multiple filters combine with AND (all must match)
Absent filter returns all entries

requirements.title: List query returning Level 1 compact summaries
requirements.spec: The list query SHALL return an array of Level 1 compact summaries (via ActionLogEntry::compact_json) matching the filter. Results are ordered by insertion (chronological). The output JSON structure: {"query": "list", "count": N, "entries": [...]}.
acceptance: list query returns entries matching the filter
Each entry uses compact_json format (short field names)
Results ordered chronologically
Output has query, count, and entries fields
Empty result returns {"query": "list", "count": 0, "entries": []}

requirements.title: Detail query returning Level 2 data
requirements.spec: The detail query SHALL require call_id and return Level 2 data from ActionLog::get_detail. If call_id is missing, return is_error with {"error": "call_id required for detail query"}. If call_id is not found, return is_error with {"error": "tool_call_id not found", "call_id": "..."}. Output structure: {"query": "detail", "entry": {Level 1 fields}, "output": {full tool output}, "args": {input arguments}, "duration_ms": N, "follow_ups": [...]}.
acceptance: detail query requires call_id
Missing call_id returns structured error
Unknown call_id returns structured error
Found entry returns Level 1 + output + args + duration + follow-ups
Output is the full tool output JSON from EventStore

requirements.title: Context query returning Level 3 data
requirements.spec: The context query SHALL require call_id and return Level 3 data from ActionLog::get_context. Same error handling as detail. Output structure extends detail with: before_content (HashMap of file paths to pre-mutation content, if available from follow-up's StoredContent) and post_validate_outcome (if recorded).
acceptance: context query requires call_id
Error handling identical to detail query
Mutation tool entries include before_content from follow-up's StoredContent
Non-mutation tool entries have before_content as null
Output extends detail format with before_content and post_validate_outcome

requirements.title: Self-referential query constraint (Level 1 only)
requirements.spec: When the action_log tool is itself called, its execution SHALL be recorded in the action log at Level 1 only. The tool dispatch path SHALL detect tool_name == "action_log" and set a flag that prevents Level 2/3 storage for this call. This prevents recursive noise — querying the log should not bloat the log with full query results.
acceptance: action_log tool call appears in the action log with Level 1 summary
Level 2 query for an action_log entry returns only the Level 1 fields (no full output stored)
100 action_log queries do not grow the action log's storage disproportionately

requirements.title: Integration tests for the action_log tool
requirements.spec: Tests SHALL verify: (1) list query with no filter returns all entries, (2) list with tool filter returns only matching entries, (3) list with outcome filter works, (4) list with last=5 returns only 5, (5) detail query returns Level 2, (6) detail with missing call_id returns error, (7) context query returns before-content for mutation tools, (8) action_log queries are logged at Level 1 only.
acceptance: Test: list with no filter returns all recorded entries
Test: list with filter.tool returns only matching tool's entries
Test: list with filter.last limits results
Test: detail for known call_id returns full output and args
Test: detail for unknown call_id returns structured error
Test: context for mutation tool includes before_content
Test: action_log tool's own entries have Level 1 only
All tests pass with cargo test -p norn

boundaries: SHALL NOT implement the mutations query — that is NTA-003
SHALL NOT implement the follow_ups query — that is NTA-004
SHALL NOT implement the mutation ledger — that is NTA-003
SHALL NOT implement follow-up action storage — that is NTA-004
SHALL NOT implement the follow_up tool — that is NTF-003
verification: cargo check -p norn succeeds with zero errors
cargo clippy -p norn -- -D warnings produces zero errors
cargo fmt -p norn -- --check produces no diff
cargo test -p norn passes all tests
action_log tool is registered and appears in tool catalogue
